title: Onboarding completes and routes to authentication
description: Verifies the onboarding introduction can be completed and the user is routed to the authentication screen.

steps.description: Log out if a logged-in session is present and the app allows logging out from this screen
Navigate to the app entry experience
Advance through the introduction steps until completion
Verify the authentication screen is displayed

title: Onboarding remote resource fallback and retry path
description: Verifies onboarding shows fallback content and a retry option when an introduction resource fails, then allows completion to authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to the app entry experience
Wait for the introduction content to load
If a loading failure state is shown, click the retry option
Advance through the introduction steps until completion
Verify the authentication screen is displayed

title: Authentication screen loads primary content
description: Verifies the authentication screen loads and shows the primary login form controls.

title: Login with valid credentials routes to home
description: Verifies a user can log in with valid credentials and land on the home dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the home dashboard

title: Login with invalid credentials shows error and stays on auth
description: Verifies invalid login attempts show an authentication error and do not navigate away from the auth screen.

steps.description: Fill invalid_user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong_password into the password field
Verify an authentication error message is visible
Verify the authentication screen is displayed

title: Signup creates account and routes to home
description: Verifies a user can switch to signup, register a new account, and be routed to the home dashboard.

steps.description: Fill a new unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Verify the user lands on the home dashboard

title: Reset password request for existing account shows confirmation and returns to auth
description: Verifies the reset password flow accepts an email, shows a confirmation, and returns to the authentication screen.

steps.description: Verify a password reset confirmation is visible
Verify the authentication screen is displayed

title: Reset password request for unknown email shows error and stays in reset flow
description: Verifies the reset password flow shows an error for an unknown email and does not proceed to confirmation.

steps.description: Fill unknown_user@example.com into the email field
Verify an error indicating no account found is visible
Verify the reset password screen remains displayed

title: Create and save a workout template with exercises and focus metrics
description: Verifies a logged-in user can create a workout template by adding exercises, assigning focus metrics, and saving successfully.

steps.description: Click the navigation option to create a new workout template
Fill a template name into the template name field
Add an exercise to the template
Select a primary focus metric for the exercise
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Saving a template with no exercises shows validation error
description: Verifies the template form blocks saving when no exercises are defined and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Fill a template name into the template name field
Verify a validation error indicating at least one exercise is required is visible
Verify the create template screen remains displayed

title: End-to-end: save template then start active workout, log sets, and finish to summary
description: Verifies a user can create a template, start an active workout from it, log set data, and finish to the summary screen.

steps.description: Fill a template name into the template name field
Add an exercise to the template
Select a primary focus metric for the exercise
Click the option to start a workout from the saved template
Fill a valid weight into the weight field for the current set
Fill a valid reps count into the reps field for the current set
Verify the workout summary screen is displayed

title: Complete an active workout session end-to-end to summary
description: Verifies a user can start an active workout, log at least one set, manage rest, and finish to reach the summary screen.

steps.description: Click the control to start an active workout session
Start a workout session from an available template or default option
Fill a valid numeric weight into the weight field for the current set
Fill a valid numeric reps value into the reps field for the current set
Wait for the rest timer to be in a running state
Verify the workout summary screen is displayed
Verify completed set details are displayed

title: Validate set logging rejects non-numeric weight and allows correction
description: Verifies invalid set input shows a validation error and the user can correct it to continue logging.

steps.description: Click the control to start an active workout session
Start a workout session from an available template or default option
Fill non-numeric text into the weight field for the current set
Fill a valid numeric reps value into the reps field for the current set
Verify a set input validation error is visible
Replace the weight value with a valid numeric weight
Verify the set is added to the logged sets list

title: Edit an exercise during an active session and still finish to summary
description: Verifies the user can modify an exercise mid-session, continue logging, and complete the workout to reach the summary.

steps.description: Click the control to start an active workout session
Start a workout session from an available template or default option
Open the exercise edit controls for an exercise in the session
Adjust the planned reps target to a different valid value
Fill a valid numeric weight into the weight field for the current set
Fill a valid numeric reps value into the reps field for the current set
Verify the workout summary screen is displayed
Verify the summary includes the logged set details

title: Rest timer can be paused and resumed during an active workout
description: Verifies the rest timer controls work during a session and remain usable after toggling state.

steps.description: Click the control to start an active workout session
Start a workout session from an available template or default option
Wait for the rest timer to be in a running state
Wait for the rest timer to be in a paused state
Verify the rest timer is in a running state

title: Remove an exercise during an active session and continue logging
description: Verifies an exercise can be removed mid-session and the session remains usable for remaining exercises.

steps.description: Click the control to start an active workout session
Start a workout session from an available template or default option
Open the exercise edit controls for an exercise in the session
Remove the exercise from the session
Confirm the removal within the app UI if prompted
Select a remaining exercise in the session
Fill a valid numeric weight into the weight field for the current set
Fill a valid numeric reps value into the reps field for the current set
Verify the set is added for the remaining exercise
Verify the removed exercise is no longer displayed in the session

title: Workout summary displays key metrics after finishing a workout
description: Verifies the summary shows set-level details and aggregate metrics after completing a workout.

steps.description: Click the control to start an active workout session
Start a workout session from an available template or default option
Fill a valid numeric weight into the weight field for the current set
Fill a valid numeric reps value into the reps field for the current set

title: Dismiss workout summary and return to main app experience
description: Verifies the user can dismiss the summary screen after a workout and continue using the app.

steps.description: Click the control to start an active workout session
Start a workout session from an available template or default option
Fill a valid numeric weight into the weight field for the current set
Fill a valid numeric reps value into the reps field for the current set
Verify the user lands on the main dashboard or primary tab view

title: Workout summary handles finishing with no logged sets
description: Verifies that completing a workout without logged sets results in an empty or partial summary with guidance.

steps.description: Click the control to start an active workout session
Start a workout session from an available template or default option
Verify an empty or partial session summary is displayed
Verify guidance to log more workout data is visible

title: History page loads with previous workouts and calendar view
description: Verifies the History tab loads its primary content and allows selecting a workout to view details.

steps.description: Click the navigation control to open workout history
Verify a list of previous workouts is displayed
Select a workout from the history list
Verify detailed session data and performance graphs are displayed

title: History time range selection updates graphs or shows insufficient-data message
description: Verifies selecting different time ranges results in either displayed insights or an insufficient-data message based on what the UI provides.

steps.description: Click the navigation control to open workout history
Select a different valid time range option
Verify performance graphs and insights are displayed or an insufficient-data message is visible

title: Update profile details and save successfully
description: Verifies a signed-in user can update profile details/preferences and save changes with a visible confirmation.

steps.description: Click the navigation entry to open the profile screen
Update a profile detail field with a new valid value
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Profile validation prevents saving invalid data
description: Verifies invalid profile data shows a validation error and the user remains on the profile screen.

steps.description: Click the navigation entry to open the profile screen
Fill invalid text into a required profile field
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the profile screen is still displayed

title: Profile screen loads primary content
description: Verifies the profile screen loads and displays primary profile/settings content for a signed-in user.

steps.description: Verify profile details and settings controls are displayed

title: Home shows weekly plan and streak status
description: Verifies the home dashboard displays the weekly plan and current streak status for a signed-in user.

steps.description: Verify the current weekly plan is displayed
Verify the streak status is displayed

title: Complete a workout and see streak reflected on home
description: Verifies completing a logged workout session updates the streak display when returning to home.

steps.description: Click the action to start a required workout from the weekly plan
Wait for the active workout screen to load
Log at least one set in the active workout
Wait for the summary screen to load
Click the navigation entry to return to the home screen
Verify the streak status reflects the newly logged workout

title: At-risk streak shows prioritization guidance
description: Verifies the home screen can surface guidance to prioritize important workouts when the streak is at risk.

steps.description: Scroll through the weekly plan and streak area
Verify prioritization guidance is displayed when the streak is at risk

title: Optional workout cannot be marked complete without a logged session
description: Verifies attempting to mark an optional workout complete without logging shows guidance that only logged workouts count.

steps.description: Click an optional workout in the weekly plan
Attempt to mark the optional workout complete without starting a session
Verify guidance is displayed that only logged workouts count toward streaks

title: Set a primary focus metric, run session, and see comparisons in summary
description: Verifies setting a primary metric for an exercise carries through to an active session and produces focus metric comparisons on the summary screen.

steps.description: Add an exercise to the template
Select a primary focus metric for the exercise
Click the action to start a workout using the newly saved template
Wait for the active workout screen to load
Log at least one set for the exercise using valid values
Wait for the summary screen to load
Verify focus metric comparisons are displayed for the exercise

title: Unsupported or malformed focus metric value shows validation error then allows correction
description: Verifies invalid metric input is blocked with a validation error and can be corrected to save the template.

steps.description: Add an exercise to the template
Attempt to set an unsupported or malformed primary focus metric value
Verify a validation error is visible
Correct the primary focus metric to a supported valid value
Verify the template is saved successfully

title: Create-template page loads exercise configuration controls
description: Verifies the create-template page loads and exposes controls to configure exercises including focus metric selection.

steps.description: Verify exercise configuration controls are displayed
